name: ASUS B760M-AYW WIFI D4 II Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - Intel B760 Chipset - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 5Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS B760M-AYW WIFI D4 II Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX LGA 1700 motherboard with DDR4 support and Wi-Fi 6 for budget-conscious PC builders.
